examples: These settlements acted like small towns, becoming centers for the artisan and trading populations.
Unlike artisan workshops in which apprentices worked closely with the masters supervising them, factories sharply separated workers from management.
All of it appeared to be handmade, probably by a 17th century artisan.
It is also, surprisingly, a renowned spot to buy handicrafts and artisan goods such as tapestries and ceramics.
The clothing business, he believes, is influenced by the same trajectory as artisan food.
